installation: copied skill directory; not a working-tree symlink

explicit_oneshot.prompt: Use /tldraw. Return exactly one sentence naming the ${HERMES_SKILL_DIR} reference file that covers importing and parsing a .tldr document.
explicit_oneshot.response: ${HERMES_SKILL_DIR}/references/data-files-assets-export-mermaid.md covers importing and parsing a .tldr document.

limitations: This verifies local copied distribution. A clean clone of the public remote is a separate release gate.
